text: “Registration” means the registration certificate and plate issued under the laws of this State pertaining to the registration of motor vehicles.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.110 — “Registration” defined.

“Registration” means the registration certificate and plate issued under the laws of this State pertaining to the registration of motor vehicles.

subsections.text: “Registration” means the registration certificate and plate issued under the laws of this State pertaining to the registration of motor vehicles.
